privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Log Kow values (acceptable tolerance +/- 0.5): Chlordane: 5.54 (Risk: High), Benzene: 2.13 (Risk: Low), Pentachlorophenol: 5.12 (Risk: High), Ethyl Acetate: 0.73 (Risk: Low), Polychlorinated Biphenyls: 6.0 (Risk: High). Risk classification rule: High if Log Kow >= 4.0, Low if < 4.0. Output file path: /home/ga/Documents/bioaccumulation_screening.txt.
